creator: nkoch@demig.de
text:
I tried i386 kernels 12.2, 12.3 and 13.0. The kernels always report to be unable to find a valid geom device. I also see the error message vmbus0: cannot find free IDT vector.
The suggested workaround (https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-src-all/2018-January/157277.html) seems not to work for i386.
